data.title: Tilray releases 2025 Holiday Drink Gift Guide featuring craft beers, premium spirits, and ready-to-drink cocktails. Celebrate with North America's best.
data.description: In Atlanta on December 4, 2025, Tilray Brands, Inc. (Nasdaq: TLRY; TSX: TLRY), a leading global company in beverage, cannabis, and wellness sectors, introduced the Ultimate 2025 Holiday Drink Gift Guide. This guide features a selection of craft beers, premium spirits, ready-to-drink cocktails, and hemp-derived beverages crafted for the holiday season. It aims to enhance gatherings and foster connections, targeting consumers across North America.

data.title: NeuroSense to meet with Health Canada in April 2026; developing treatments for neurodegenerative diseases.
data.description: NeuroSense Therapeutics Ltd., a biotechnology company based in Cambridge, Mass, revealed on Dec. 4, 2025, that they have progressed to the late-clinical stage in developing innovative therapies for severe neurodegenerative illnesses. The company, trading under the ticker symbol NASDAQ: NRSN, disclosed that they had an encouraging meeting with Health authorities.

data.title: David Hastings appointed as CFO at Trevi Therapeutics, Nasdaq: TRVI, to lead financial strategy for growth.
data.description: A skilled CFO from the biotech industry has been appointed to oversee financial strategy and support Trevi Therapeutics, Inc.'s growth phase in New Haven, Conn. The company, listed on Nasdaq as TRVI, specializes in developing the experimental drug Haduvio™. This strategic move was announced on Dec. 4, 2025.

data.title: Polyrizon Ltd. in Israel (Nasdaq: PLRZ) is advancing respiratory defense tech with non-pharmacological solutions globally.
data.description: In Ra’anana, Israel, a biotech innovator, Polyrizon Ltd. (Nasdaq: PLRZ), is making strides in reshaping respiratory defense against airborne threats like allergens and viruses. This development-stage biotechnology company is moving towards transforming its lab-born vision into a scalable reality. With a recent announcement of reaching a pivotal manufacturing milestone, Polyrizon is transitioning from a promising startup to actively working on developing non-pharmacological solutions. These solutions have the potential to protect global populations from seasonal respiratory issues and beyond.

data.title: Encore Search Partners CEO predicts major shifts in 2026 hiring due to strong candidate expectations, rapid AI adoption, and stalled leadership hiring.
data.description: In 2026, the job market is set to witness a significant shift with high candidate standards, swift AI integration, and a slowdown in leadership recruitment. According to CEO Jeremy Jenson of Encore Search Partners, the upcoming year will be marked by intense competition, driven by the hiring practices of 2025. The focus on quality candidates, widespread adoption of AI technology, and the scarcity of leadership placements are expected to shape the job landscape. This shift signals the need for businesses to adapt to the evolving hiring trends in order to stay competitive.

data.title: Allegion announces quarterly dividend of $0.51 per share, payable on Dec. 31, 2025 to shareholders of record on Dec. 16.
data.description: Allegion plc, a prominent global security products and solutions provider, recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.51 per ordinary share on Dec. 3, 2025. This dividend will be distributed on Dec. 31, 2025, to shareholders of record as of Dec. 16, 2025. Allegion prioritizes designing and producing cutting-edge security and access solutions to ensure safety in various environments such as residential, educational, and commercial spaces. The company is listed as ALLE on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE).

data.title: Amber Homes Real Estate emerges as centerpiece in Dubai's luxury real estate boom amidst global high-net-worth investment surge.
data.description: Amidst a luxury real estate boom in Dubai, Amber Homes Real Estate emerges as a key player in the global high-net-worth investment scene. The city's flourishing real estate market has positioned the company at the forefront of lucrative opportunities, attracting significant attention from wealthy investors worldwide. With Dubai becoming a hotspot for affluent individuals seeking prime real estate opportunities, Amber Homes Real Estate has capitalized on this trend to establish itself as a central figure in the global high-net-worth investment landscape. This development underscores the city's growing reputation as a magnet for high-end property investments, with Dubai's luxury real estate sector continuing to witness remarkable growth and interest from wealthy individuals looking to capitalize on the city's lucrative property market.

data.title: Abelardo’s Mexican Fresh partners with PAR Technology to upgrade tech with PAR POS™, PAR® hardware, and more.
data.description: In New Hartford, N.Y., PAR Technology Corporation (NYSE: PAR), a top foodservice technology provider, disclosed that Abelardo’s Mexican Fresh, a rapidly expanding restaurant chain focused on offering lively, genuine Mexican dishes, has selected PAR’s comprehensive solutions. This includes PAR POS™, PAR® Hardware, PAR® Pay, PAR® Payment Services, PAR® Engagement, and PAR OPS™ Recovery to revamp and consolidate its restaurant technology setup. Abelardo’s, known for its dedication to authentic Mexican flavors, is making this significant technology upgrade with PAR's systems.

data.title: Vince Holding Corp (Nasdaq: VNCE) to take part in KeyBanc Capital Markets Consumer Conference on Dec 11, 2025 at 2:25 PM. Webcast at http://investors.vince.com.
data.description: Vince Holding Corp., a global contemporary retailer trading under Nasdaq as VNCE, is set to take part in a fireside chat at the KeyBanc Capital Markets Consumer Conference on December 11, 2025, commencing at 2:25 PM Eastern Time. The event will be conducted virtually and interested individuals can tune in live via webcast on http://investors.vince.com. For those unable to attend during the scheduled time, an online recording will be accessible for 90 days after the conference.
U.S. JOB CUTS TOTAL 71,321 IN NOVEMBER - CHALLENGER

data.title: SAP's growth score rises to 90.12th percentile, outperforming 90% of peers in earnings and revenue expansion.
data.description: SAP SE has experienced significant growth, landing in the top decile for expansion. According to recent data from Benzinga Edge's Stock Rankings, the German software company, a competitor of Salesforce Inc., saw its growth ranking increase from the 89.71st percentile to the 90.12th percentile. This places SAP ahead of 90% of its peers in historical earnings and revenue expansion, showcasing strong operational performance despite facing downward price pressure. The Benzinga Edge Growth metric considers both earnings and revenue expansion to assess a stock's growth potential. For more information, visit the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Smint.io, Censhare, and Marmind collaborate to enhance content experiences for brands, forming the Entirely ecosystem.
data.description: In LINZ, Austria, a significant business development has taken place as Smint.io, a prominent player in content experience platforms, has revealed a noteworthy OEM partnership with Censhare and Marmind. The two companies, known as founding partners of Entirely, which is recognized as the world's pioneer open, AI-native marketing technology ecosystem, have joined forces with Smint.io. This collaboration combines Smint.io’s extensive content experience knowledge with Censhare’s two-decade-long expertise in content services and Marmind's cutting-edge Marketing Resource Management software. The partnership, established in November 2025, integrates Smint.io's advanced technology offerings with the capabilities of Censhare and Marmind.

data.title: Wall Street raises expectations for DocuSign ahead of Q3 earnings release on Dec 4. Analysts predict earnings of 91 cents per share, up from 90 cents last year, with revenue estimated at $807.42 million, up from $754.82 million. DocuSign also announces integration with ChatGPT platform. Stock rose 2.6% to $70.62.
data.description: DocuSign, Inc. (NASDAQ: DOCU) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on December 4 after the market closes. Analysts predict the San Francisco-based company will report earnings of 91 cents per share, an increase from 90 cents per share in the same period last year. Projections show DocuSign's quarterly revenue to be around $807.42 million, up from $754.82 million a year ago. The company recently revealed plans to integrate its agreement management platform into ChatGPT via the Model Context Protocol. Closing at $70.62 on Wednesday, DocuSign's stock saw a 2.6% increase. For more details, refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.

data.title: Wizerr AI launches Agentic BOM Engine for electronics manufacturing, powered by NVIDIA, with patent-pending Component Intelligence Layer.
data.description: In San Francisco, Wizerr has unveiled the Agentic BOM Engine, a cutting-edge multi-agent workflow designed for electronics manufacturing. This innovative technology is driven by a unique Component Intelligence Layer that enhances efficiency and accuracy in the production process. The release of this new system marks a significant advancement in AI for manufacturing, showcasing the company's commitment to pushing the industry forward.

data.title: Coppernico starts geophysical program at Sombrero copper-gold project in Peru via UAV survey and ground gravity survey aimed at refining interpretations and defining drill targets.
data.description: Coppernico Metals Inc., traded as COPR on TSX, CPPMF on OTCQB, and 9I3 on FSE, has started a significant UAV magnetic survey and ground gravity survey through its Peruvian subsidiary, Sombrero Minerales SAC, at the Sombrero copper-gold skarn-porphyry Project in Peru. The surveys aim to enhance geological interpretations beneath cover, aid in defining drill targets, and delineate the extent of the broader Sombrero mineralized system. This initiative involves assessing multiple targets and marks a crucial step in the Company's exploration efforts.

data.title: RP1 allows developers access to the Spatial Internet, opening on Dec 8, 2025, for creating 3D experiences with own servers.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, RP1 has announced the official opening of access to the world's first metaverse browser on December 8, 2025. Six months after its introduction at AWE 2025, developers worldwide can now connect to the open spatial internet. RP1 is providing a suite of tools and documentation for building and self-hosting real-time 3D experiences using personal servers, enabling data ownership and monetization control for creators. This initiative empowers creators by allowing them to directly manage their content.
